message.content: Usando i valori originali del turno precedente, rispondi soltanto con JSON valido con chiavi sorted_unique (lista crescente senza duplicati) ed even_count (numero di elementi pari nella lista originale).

content.thinking:
The user wants me to use the original values from the previous turn: [40, 28, 4, -30, -3, -1, 31, 32, 29]

sorted_unique: sort the list and remove duplicates. All values are unique, so sorted: [-30, -3, -1, 4, 28, 29, 31, 32, 40]

even_count: count of even numbers in the original list. Let me check each:
- 40: even
- 28: even
- 4: even
- -30: even
- -3: odd
- -1: odd
- 31: odd
- 32: even
- 29: odd

Even count: 5 (40, 28, 4, -30, 32)
